definitions: n. 尸体；遗体 (在此语境下指已灭绝生物的遗骸)

examples.text: Earth was now the stage of something grand, a complexity acceleration machine going at full speed. Millions of new species emerged and vanished. Life was beaten down over and over, but every time it came back stronger, resettling niches filled with corpses of the ones that came before.
examples.explanation: 这里的 corpses 是 corpse 的复数，意思是“尸体、遗骸”。整句表示：生命一次次被打击后又重新繁盛，占据了那些由先前生物尸骸填满的生态位。这里更接近“生物遗骸”的意思。

reviewSessions.example_text: Earth was now the stage of something grand, a complexity acceleration machine going at full speed. Millions of new species emerged and vanished. Life was beaten down over and over, but every time it came back stronger. Resettling niches filled with corpses of the ones that came before. expected_definitions: n. 尸体；遗体 (在此语境下指已灭绝生物的遗骸)
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了 corpse 在此处的核心含义。
matched_points: 能用于指前代生物留下的遗骸
